title: Respawn Rejoin
description: Player dies while ball is actively contested. Respawn path must allow the player to return to an active or immediately subsequent contest within ~10 seconds.

expected_outcomes.description: Respawned player can reach the active contest or the next one within ~10 seconds.

must_not_outcomes.description: Respawn location or timing locks the player out of play for more than 10 seconds.

notes: Spawn placement is map-critical. All EFT maps must be validated against this — spawn clusters that are too far from the contest center will fail.
